title: Laravel: notification.sending
description: A notification is about to be sent.

channel.description: Channel the notification is sent through, e.g. "mail", "slack".

queue.description: Queue name if the notification was queued.

requestId.description: Request ID from the X-Request-Id or Request-Id header, or a generated UUID. Set by AssignRequestId middleware into Laravel's shared log context.

request_id.description: Alias — same value as requestId, present if set via event context.
